overall.description: Gameplay footage from a historical open-world game depicting a foggy morning walk through a Victorian-era city. The player character traverses cobblestone streets, enters Guiteau Square, climbs an overlook to view a cemetery, then exits to observe a vintage electric tram passing by.

events.description: horse-drawn wooden carriage passes from left to right across the intersection
camera turns right toward the Guiteau Square entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet cobblestone street observing the passing carriage and surroundings

notable_agents.action: wooden horse-drawn carriage with driver and passenger moving across the street

entered.detail: wet cobblestone road surface with embedded tram tracks and puddles
tall wooden telegraph poles with multiple cross-arms and wires
multi-story red brick building with ornate roof details visible through fog
black iron fence pillars in the immediate foreground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy cobblestone street with a horse-drawn carriage passing by. The camera walks forward along the wet stones, passing wooden utility poles and observing Victorian brick buildings through the morning mist before turning toward a square entrance.

events.description: passing through the ornate metal archway into Guiteau Square

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through the entrance gate into the public square

notable_agents.action: man in brown suit and fedora walking past camera toward the street
woman in long Victorian dress standing near the gate entrance

entered.detail: ornate black metal archway with gold lettering reading 'GUITEAU SQUARE'
decorative red brick pillars with carved stone caps flanking the entrance
decorative red brick pillars with carved stone caps flanking the entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking toward the entrance of Guiteau Square, the camera passes a man in a brown suit and approaches an ornate metal gate with brick pillars. The segment ends as the camera passes through the archway into the park area.

scene_state.functional_zone: park square with bandstand and cemetery overlook

events.description: beginning to ascend wooden stairs to the elevated cemetery viewing platform
reaching the top platform revealing the cemetery view with obelisk monument

agents.ego_description: walking through the park past the bandstand and climbing wooden stairs to the cemetery overlook

notable_agents.action: couple sitting together on a wooden park bench under the trees

entered.detail: open-air wooden gazebo with elevated platform and stairs
weathered wooden staircase with railings leading up to overlook
numerous stone tombstones and burial monuments visible through fog
tall stone obelisk rising prominently above the cemetery

segments.scene_description: Inside Guiteau Square, the camera walks across the grassy park past a wooden bandstand and a couple on a bench. The character ascends weathered wooden stairs to an elevated platform overlooking a foggy cemetery with a prominent obelisk monument.

events.description: exiting Guiteau Square back onto the cobblestone street
vintage electric streetcar passes by on the tracks heading left

agents.ego_description: descending from the overlook, exiting the square, and observing the passing streetcar

notable_agents.action: dark green vintage electric tram with trolley pole moving along the street tracks
man in blue coat standing on the sidewalk near the building corner

entered.detail: vintage streetcar with large windows and trolley pole on the roof
brick building with ornate iron balcony and hotel signage
black ornate Victorian street lamp on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Descending from the cemetery overlook, the camera exits Guiteau Square back to the cobblestone street. A vintage electric tram passes by on the tracks, and the camera follows it past a corner building with an ornate iron balcony.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty Victorian street through a public square and up to a cemetery overlook before returning to the city's transit lines. It begins by walking along wet cobblestones past a horse-drawn carriage and brick buildings shrouded in morning mist, moving steadily toward the entrance of Guiteau Square. As the camera passes a man in a brown suit and an ornate metal gate, the scene opens into a grassy park featuring a wooden bandstand and a couple on a bench. The path then ascends weathered wooden stairs to an elevated platform overlooking a foggy cemetery and a prominent obelisk, before descending back through the square to the street. Finally, the camera follows a vintage electric tram as it glides along the tracks past a corner building with an ornate iron balcony.
